basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow and JRF Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Junior Research Fellow (JRF)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.aiims.edu. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Delhi SRF and JRF Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree in Psychology or Allied Fields from a recognized University, Two years of research experience (for SRF), UGC NET or GATE qualified (desirable)
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Post graduate degree in Psychology or Allied Fields from a recognized University AND Two years of research experience. Desirable: UGC NET or GATE qualified, M.Phil in Clinical Psychology from RCI-recognized Institute. Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Post graduate degree in Psychology or Allied Fields from a recognized University. Desirable: UGC NET or GATE qualified.

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 54,600/- p.m. Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 48,100/- p.m.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions is 28th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for SRF and JRF posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced under this recruitment drive. One vacancy is for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position, and the other is for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For both posts, a postgraduate degree in Psychology or Allied Fields from a recognized University is required. Additionally, for the SRF position, two years of research experience is mandatory. UGC NET or GATE qualification is desirable for both.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the SRF and JRF positions?
faq.answer: The selected Senior Research Fellow (SRF) will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 54,600/-. The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will be paid Rs. 48,100/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) and Junior Research Fellow (JRF) positions will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification indicates that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or restrictions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided link to fill out and submit their application form.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the posts?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations for these posts. Candidates are recommended to refer to the official notification for detailed information regarding age criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is crucial to download and read the PDF thoroughly before applying.
